title: 10 Signs Your Work Ethic Is Actually Avoidance of God
caption:
Busy isn't the same as faithful. Here are 10 signs your work ethic has quietly become a way to avoid God, not serve Him:

1. You work late so you don't have to sit still with Him.
2. Sunday's the one day you can't seem to protect.
3. You measure the day by output, never by obedience.
4. You'd rather grind than kneel.
5. Your inbox gets more discipline than your Bible does.
6. You call it "provision" so it doesn't have to be examined.
7. Rest feels like guilt instead of a command.
8. You can't name the last time you worked for an audience of one.
9. Your to-do list is longer than your prayer list, and it isn't close.
10. You're building something, but you couldn't say who it's actually for.

God rested on the seventh day by design, not exhaustion. (Genesis 2:2)

Save this and check your calendar against it this week.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #work #discipline
